headline: S&P 500 at critical crossroads
detail: A headline warning of potential further losses if the S&P breaks lower is directly relevant to your book. You're margin-heavy in tech, so a broad market leg down hits you harder than most — PLTR, AVGO, and CRWD would all feel it fast.

headline: SpaceX stock called a 'terrible buy'
detail: This targets SPCX and SPAL directly. Negative sentiment on a brand-new IPO with limited data can accelerate selling quickly; SPAL is 2x leveraged so decay and volatility are doubled. Worth reading the full piece before adding any size.

headline: Fed's Goolsbee says inflation still too high
detail: Goolsbee pushing back on rate cuts is a headwind for high-multiple tech — exactly your concentration. Disagreement between Fed officials (Williams sees easing) keeps uncertainty elevated, which typically pressures names like PLTR and AVGO.

headline: ON Semiconductor acquires Synaptics for $7B in physical AI push
detail: Chip sector M&A in the physical AI space is a read-through for SMH and AVGO. Consolidation can lift sentiment in the broader chip space, but watch whether it signals defensive moves rather than growth confidence.
